economic_notes: Pigeon River Contractors Ltd. holds two quarry leases. Berens River Gaming Commission and Berens River Community Bingo operations included. Mee-Mee-Wee-Seepi Development Corporation is a 100% owned subsidiary involved in development activities.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two grounds: (1) accounts payable completeness could not be verified due to inadequate financial system tracking; (2) Berens River Gaming Commission and Berens River Community Bingo revenues and expenses could not be verified due to internal control weaknesses over cash-based transactions. Six fully consolidated subsidiaries. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($15,023,235) + Health Canada ($5,473,321) + CMHC ($973,283) + Province of Manitoba ($39,295) = $21,508,834. OSR includes First Peoples Development Inc., gaming revenue, rental income, and fuel/gravel/sundry. Deferred revenue is very large at $9.5M. Net debt position of $18.77M. Financial statements were filed very late — audit report dated May 5, 2023 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
